reviews_list.review_title: I am decently satisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: Placements differ from batch to batch. Placements for the 2021 batch are not completed yet. Around 31 students out of the entire batch of 2020 got placed in companies like Khaitan and Co, L&L Partners, Argus Partners, Fox Mandal and Co and Aquilaw.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a temporary library in 3 rooms now, and the building is being built. It is open till 3 am. NLUO has a bank ATM, Nescafe, stationery and printing shop, canteen and mess, juice shop and a decent gym. The mess is student-run, and there is a good quality of food.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is disillusioned, but a reality for most universities.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students get placed from our college. However, in the recent batches, placements have been getting better, with dozens being recruited from on-campus recruitments. L&L, Khaitan, CAM, and SAM are some of the major recruiters. The average salary package offered ranges from 12 LPA - 14 LPA. The internship committee has been very active since 2018, and in 2019. More than 60 internships were secured for winter and summer internships each.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is adequate and is available for multiple devices (earlier it was one device per student). Classrooms are good, though maintenance is needed. Bathrooms in the academic block are in bad shape, though those in hostels are good and maintained properly. The library is congested as two classrooms have been converted into libraries. There is a huge building under construction for years now to be the library. Optimistically, the PWD has taken up construction, and it shows positive steps of actually being completed in very few years. The hostel is somewhat good, and you get single occupancy rooms. Structural problems like leakage of water are prevalent in the older buildings, especially the girls hostels. The mess is pretty damn good. The mess committee is made up of students, and every day the food served is different. Non-vegetarian food is served thrice in a week, usually at nights. Medical facilities have been sorely lacking for a long time and only recently have positive steps being taken. There are many ambulances, medicines, etc. Sports facilities are moderate. We also have 2 basketball courts and two courts for tennis, badminton and volleyball. Space for the football field is available, but it has not been worked on. Those who play cricket usually go to the Barabati Stadium on the university bus.

review_summary.college_name: NLU Odisha (NLUO) - National Law University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Placements of NLUO are above average as compared to other NLUs.

content.Placements: Out of a batch strength of 180, more than 70 students were placed last year. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA by Cyril Amalchand Mangaldas. The average salary package offered was 8 LPA-10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 8 LPA. TriLegal, Khaitan & Co., Luthra & Associates, and Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas are some of the top recruiting firms at our college. Roles offered in our course are legal intern, junior associate, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are not that great. Rooms are very small, with double sharing in the first year. Food is good, mess is operated by students themselves so food has variety and taste also. Hostels and classrooms have Wi-Fi, and also library is one of the biggest in Asia.

content.Placements: Out of 80 students who participated in the recruitment process, 71 were placed in the 2023 batch. The average package was 11.7 LPA. The highest package stood at 18 LPA. The top recruiters were Trilegal, Luthra and Luthra, Induslaw, Khaitan & Co., and Saraf and Partners.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very decent infrastructure. It has Wi-Fi all over the campus. NLUO has Asia's biggest law library with centralized AC. Except for the hostel, you will find centralized AC on campus. It has 3 canteens, one of which works during the day and the other two during the night, along with one Nescafe shop and a juice centre. The mess food is average. The college has one outdoor sports court, a sports room for indoor sports, one cricket ground, and a football field with a gym.

individual_reviews.title: I am decently satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: Placements differ from batch to batch. Placements for the 2021 batch are not completed yet. Around 31 students out of the entire batch of 2020 got placed in companies like Khaitan and Co, L&L Partners, Argus Partners, Fox Mandal and Co and Aquilaw.
content.Infrastructure: We have a temporary library in 3 rooms now, and the building is being built. It is open till 3 am. NLUO has a bank ATM, Nescafe, stationery and printing shop, canteen and mess, juice shop and a decent gym. The mess is student-run, and there is a good quality of food.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is disillusioned, but a reality for most universities.

content.Placements: Most of the students get placed from our college. However, in the recent batches, placements have been getting better, with dozens being recruited from on-campus recruitments. L&L, Khaitan, CAM, and SAM are some of the major recruiters. The average salary package offered ranges from 12 LPA - 14 LPA. The internship committee has been very active since 2018, and in 2019. More than 60 internships were secured for winter and summer internships each.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is adequate and is available for multiple devices (earlier it was one device per student). Classrooms are good, though maintenance is needed. Bathrooms in the academic block are in bad shape, though those in hostels are good and maintained properly. The library is congested as two classrooms have been converted into libraries. There is a huge building under construction for years now to be the library. Optimistically, the PWD has taken up construction, and it shows positive steps of actually being completed in very few years. The hostel is somewhat good, and you get single occupancy rooms. Structural problems like leakage of water are prevalent in the older buildings, especially the girls hostels. The mess is pretty damn good. The mess committee is made up of students, and every day the food served is different. Non-vegetarian food is served thrice in a week, usually at nights. Medical facilities have been sorely lacking for a long time and only recently have positive steps being taken. There are many ambulances, medicines, etc. Sports facilities are moderate. We also have 2 basketball courts and two courts for tennis, badminton and volleyball. Space for the football field is available, but it has not been worked on. Those who play cricket usually go to the Barabati Stadium on the university bus.

individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of the college is good.

content.Placements: Placements for our senior batch are good. They got hired in top law firms like Amarchand, Khaitan & Co., Luthra and Luthra, etc. There is a placement committee in the university which is a student body and supervised by a faculty adviser. The committee plays a key role in acquiring placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides excellent infrastructural facilities. There are single accommodation rooms available in our hostels with a good canteen which offers north Indian and south Indian food. The college provides unlimited Wi-Fi facility. There is a library with several books, and we have an amphitheatre, sports complex, etc.

placement_data.title: NLU Odisha Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the latest report, the participating recruiters offered 43 jobs to the batch 2024 of courses like BA LLB, BBA LLB, and LLM. The highest and median package offered during NLU Odisha placements 2024 stood at INR 19.5 LPA and INR 13 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of NLU Odisha in 2024 are Trilegal, Indus Law, Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas, Saraf and Partners, AZB and Partners, Khaitan & Co, ICICI Bank, Infosys , etc.

A total of 75 students took part in the NLU Odisha placements 2024, of which 34 students were placed with leading domestic law firms. Further, 3 students were placed with corporations and banking companies in in-house roles, 4 students were placed with litigation chambers and Judicial clerkships, and 2 students were placed with think tanks and legal counseling institutes. In total, 43 students were placed in NLUO placements in 2024.

hostel.description: There are 2 boys hostels and 1 girls hostel. The facilities provided in hostel include reading area, cafeteria, medical facility, 24 hours internet facility, television with cable connection facility, movie screening, indoor game facility, music facility, well-furnished rooms, common rooms, modular kitchen, gym facilities, recreational facilities, water coolers with R.O. system at each floor/ block and first aid kit for emergency usage.

library.description: NLUO's library has a collection of 15,000 books, about 1200 primary legal texts and more than a hundred law reports, academic journals. The University possesses access to online databases such as LexisNexis, Westlaw India, Manupatra, Kluwer Arbitration International, AdvocateKhoj, and AIR Online Database, SCC among others, as also repositories of secondary material including JSTOR, HeinOnline, Sage Journals Online, and Economic and Political Weekly Online. The library has also compiled a considerable collection of CD/DVD resources that includes Palmer on Company Law, the Journal of the Indian Law Institute, and the Annual Survey of Indian Law.

reviews.review_heading: Placements of NLUO are above average as compared to other NLUs.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are not that great. Rooms are very small, with double sharing in the first year. Food is good, mess is operated by students themselves so food has variety and taste also. Hostels and classrooms have Wi-Fi, and also library is one of the biggest in Asia.

reviews.review_heading: Impressive placements in 2023.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very decent infrastructure. It has Wi-Fi all over the campus. NLUO has Asia's biggest law library with centralized AC. Except for the hostel, you will find centralized AC on campus. It has 3 canteens, one of which works during the day and the other two during the night, along with one Nescafe shop and a juice centre. The mess food is average. The college has one outdoor sports court, a sports room for indoor sports, one cricket ground, and a football field with a gym.

reviews.review_heading: I am decently satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: We have a temporary library in 3 rooms now, and the building is being built. It is open till 3 am. NLUO has a bank ATM, Nescafe, stationery and printing shop, canteen and mess, juice shop and a decent gym. The mess is student-run, and there is a good quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is disillusioned, but a reality for most universities.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is adequate and is available for multiple devices (earlier it was one device per student). Classrooms are good, though maintenance is needed. Bathrooms in the academic block are in bad shape, though those in hostels are good and maintained properly. The library is congested as two classrooms have been converted into libraries. There is a huge building under construction for years now to be the library. Optimistically, the PWD has taken up construction, and it shows positive steps of ac...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The college provides excellent infrastructural facilities. There are single accommodation rooms available in our hostels with a good canteen which offers north Indian and south Indian food. The college provides unlimited Wi-Fi facility. There is a library with several books, and we have an amphitheatre, sports complex, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Law University, Odisha.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. The amphitheatre present in the college is the most beautiful. The sports complex, gymnasium and academic block are present in the college. There is a lot of greenery present in the college. The culture in the college is very good. The students are diverse, and they are from various parts of the country.

reviews.review_heading: An upcoming law school with good placements, infrastructure however low quality of faculty.
reviews.review_text: When I first joined the college in the year 2013, we just had one academic block and one girl's hostel and one boy's hostel. However, in the last 5 years there had been major developments in the infrastructure, and now we have an amphitheatre, academic block, administrative block,  2 girls hostel,  2 boys hostel, sports complex and a huge garden in the college. The only few things that are missing are a library, AC rooms and a guest house for parents. We have high internet connectivity, and our ...

reviews.review_heading: NLUO is a good place, if not the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is certainly the best part about NLUO. Not only the infrastructure inside the college, but the scenic beauty outside the college is also something worth noticing, absolutely zero pollution area with lush green forest and bank of Mahanadi and Kathajodi river. We've 24 hours working highspeed Wi-Fi on the campus. All the students have given separate ID and password to access that. There's no limit on usage of it. The classrooms are well-furnished occupied with all the necessary ...

reviews.review_heading: A great upcoming NLU with competent faculties, well stocked library and a good atmosphere
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Students get individual rooms in the hostel which is unique because mostly students get double sharing or triple sharing in the NLUs. Classrooms do have ACs but sometimes the management is too stingy with the usage. The college is building a huge building that will exclusively be used as library. We have a nice auditorium with a good seating capacity and a nice sports complex. The university has a sprawling campus so taking a walk around the campus early in the mornin...

reviews.review_heading: College is good with good faculty members, but administration is highly irresponsible.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very beautiful with the library, medical facilities, and sports complex. The single accommodation room for the students with Wi-Fi facilities both in hostel and campus, The food is good. We faced infrastructure issue when our college takes the students more than the maximum accommodation available in the college and there was no place for current students.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, decent infrastructure, decent feels .
reviews.review_text: Classroom are air conditioned, freshers have to spend 1 year in sharing in a small room which is very conjusted but it's adjustable. You get your separate room from second year. Nluo has the biggest humongous Library of 4 floor fully air conditioned and a very peaceful place to study. Overall Cuttack as a place is very humid so it gets very hot during summers and their are no AC's in the hostel so you have to buy your own cooler. Rest it has a very beautiful big campus and all the sports facilit...

reviews.review_heading: The life at NLUO College review.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are actually pretty good. You get furnished classrooms with ACs and projectors. There is a library, amphitheater, seminar hall, etc., for some special events. The food is also not bad. You get a decent four meals a day for Rs.20,000 in one month. There is a wellness center, and Wi-Fi is also available.

Candidates who qualify for CLAT are required to pay fee for their respective courses, which includes various components such as Tuition Fee, Examination Fee, Security Deposit, Hostel Charges (if applicable), etc. Other than the LLM fee, candidates are required to pay a fee for CLAT application fee.
